title: Untitled
prompt_text: A surreal horror scene in a crowded modern mall. A person on the floor is suddenly transformed or overtaken by a massive, fuzzy spider-human hybrid. The creature has a long, distended neck, a grotesque smiling face with large eyes, and multiple long, hairy spider legs. Onlookers in winter clothing watch in shock. The lighting is bright, artificial mall lighting against white tiled floors.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A surreal horror scene in a crowded modern mall. A person on the floor is suddenly transformed or overtaken by a massive, fuzzy spider-human hybrid. The creature has a long, distended neck, a grotesque smiling face with large eyes, and multiple long, hairy spider legs. Onlookers in winter clothing watch in shock. The lighting is bright, artificial mall lighting against white tiled floors.

cinematography.cameraShot: Low-angle tracking shot that follows the creature as it stands up and rotates, maintaining a close-to-medium distance.

actions: A man in a black vest and blue jeans lies on the floor.
A large spider-like entity with a human-like head emerges from the man.
The creature stands up, extending long, black, spindly legs.
The creature's neck elongates unnaturally as it turns to face the camera.
The creature reveals a wide, terrifying grin and stares with bulging eyes.
Bystanders in the background stop and stare in confusion and fear.
dialogue: High-pitched, distorted screeching and chattering sounds.
